name: x402-wallet
display_name: x402 Wallet by 402.md — USDC Payments for AI Agents
description: Minimal x402 wallet for Claude. Check USDC balance and sign payments on Stellar or Base — no API keys, no accounts.
long_description:
Give Claude a USDC wallet. This extension adds three tools:

- **check_balance** — View your USDC balance and wallet address
- **pay** — Sign an x402 payment authorization (USDC on Stellar or Base)
- **x402_fetch** — Fetch a URL with automatic x402 payment handling

Claude handles everything else — discovering skills, reading SKILL.md docs, calling APIs. The wallet just signs payments when needed.

Budget limits protect your funds: set max per call and max per day.

stellar_secret.title: Stellar Secret Key
stellar_secret.description: Your Stellar wallet secret key (starts with S...). Stored securely in your OS keychain.

evm_private_key.title: EVM Private Key
evm_private_key.description: Your EVM wallet private key (starts with 0x...). Stored securely in your OS keychain.

network.title: Default Network
network.description: Payment network: stellar, stellar-testnet, base, or base-sepolia.

max_per_call.title: Max USDC per Payment
max_per_call.description: Maximum USDC allowed per single payment. Safety limit.

max_per_day.title: Max USDC per Day
max_per_day.description: Maximum total USDC allowed per calendar day.

tools.name: check_balance
tools.description: Check USDC balance and wallet address on the configured network.

tools.name: pay
tools.description: Sign an x402 USDC payment authorization. Returns the X-PAYMENT header value.

tools.name: x402_fetch
tools.description: Fetch a URL with automatic x402 payment. Handles 402 responses by signing USDC payment and retrying with X-PAYMENT header.
